params_used.custom_text: // Asynchronous reset and set capabilities: on the rising edge of the clock, if the reset signal is deasserted, the output q is cleared to LOW and qn is set to HIGH. If the set signal is deasserted, the output q is set to HIGH and qn is cleared to LOW. If neither reset nor set is active, the output q takes the value of the input d, while qn provides the complementary output.
